message:
fix: atomic config writes, empty-comment validation, and MCP ID-check ordering

- config.rs: write config via temp file + rename to prevent corruption if
  the process crashes mid-write
- sqlite.rs: reject empty/whitespace-only comment text with a validation
  error instead of silently inserting a blank row
- tools.rs: check whether an issue ID actually exists in the DB before
  testing for hallucinated placeholders, so real IDs that happen to match
  placeholder heuristics are accepted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
